untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'thick layer of overhead resistance' and 'trendline connecting two or more prior peaks' which require multi-bar pattern recognition and custom resistance zone detection not available in the allowed indicator set. The concept of overhead resistance as a zone/layer cannot be precisely expressed using only OHLCV, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, and basic bar properties. A qualitative trendline identification is not available.
translation_notes: Approximated using pivot points (r1 as resistance level) and volume breakout condition as proxies for the overhead resistance pattern. However, the core signal—identifying a thick layer of prior peaks and trendline confirmation—cannot be accurately translated without custom pattern recognition logic. The exit condition uses s1 (support) as a reversal target. Stop loss and hold days are estimates based on typical mean reversion patterns.
